body:
#### PR description:

Add a few mhods which will help to debug the remaining shortcomings of  the V19 geometry

#### PR validation:

The added methods are checked, and they will be subsequently used to debug

With the subsequent bug fix it will be backported to 16_1_X
title: Phase2-hgx366B Add a few mhods which will help to debug the remaining shortcoming of  the V19 geometry
